content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”destination-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

From the beautiful beaches of Goa to the royal palaces of Rajasthan and the scenic splendour of Coorg and Mussoorie, we have some of the best destination wedding spots in India. In fact, planning a destination wedding in India is inexpensive and far easier. At ATW Travels, we’ll help you plan the perfect dream wedding. From offering the best destination wedding packages in India to guest concierge services, we’ll run the whole gamut at the most affordable prices.

We’ve used our extensive experience in the industry and relationships with trade partners to put together luxury destination wedding packages in India and abroad. Be it an intimate gathering or a big fat grand wedding, there’s nothing we cannot plan!

If you’re new to the idea of destination weddings, here are a few things to help you get started

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Pick the Perfect Destination” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

When choosing a wedding destination, keep accessibility and the guest list in mind. An offbeat location is exciting, but is it accessible for seniors or relatives with a disability? Can your guests afford to pay for their travel and accommodation? Is the weather conducive for a wedding? What kind of backdrop would you love for the ceremony? If you’ve always dreamed about saying your I dos by the beach, consider a beach location in Goa or Kerala. Choose Rajasthan for its traditional and palatial ambiance if you love pomp and grandeur.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Choosing The Right Date:” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

October to March is the best season for weddings because the weather is pleasant and there are plenty of auspicious dates during these months. Your choice of date also depends on the location. For instance, hill stations like Mussoorie and Ooty are very cold during winter. If you’re looking for affordable destination wedding packages, choose a date in the off-season. Since there’s less crowd and fewer hotel bookings, wedding costs will be lower. Professionals like makeup artists and photographers are readily available.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

With ATW Travels, budgets aren’t a problem. You can avail the best destination wedding packages, even during the peak season. Just let us know your chosen date, and we’ll reserve the venue, book your rooms, and engage professional artists like decorators and photographers immediately.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

The shoulder season is a great time as well – you can save your guests and yourselves money and still experience the great weather.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Decide On The Budget” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Destination weddings in India usually start from around INR 10 Lakh and could go up to INR 60 Lakhs or more, depending on the location, season, and number of guests. ATW Travels offers the best destination wedding packages irrespective of your budget.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Destination Wedding Venues In India” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

We offer destination wedding packages in some of the most exotic locations in India. Some of them are listed below:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Namah, Jim Corbett” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Namah Resort is 10kms away from the picturesque Jim Corbett National Park. If your idea of a perfect wedding includes a mandap surrounded by wildlife and forest hills, this is the ideal place for a destination wedding. Your guests will enjoy the peace and harmony that envelops the Park. The resort is at a comfortable distance away from the hustle and bustle of city life. With more than 3116 sq. ft of available space, the Resort can accommodate hundreds of guests. It also has beautifully decorated banquet halls and a ballroom that can be tailored to your requirements.

Wedding Cost: 20–25 lakhs[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”JaiBagh Palace, Jaipur” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Gracefully positioned in a natural setting amidst the Aravalli Range, Jaipur’s JaiBagh Palace is excellent for weddings and other special occasions. The palace has an indoor banquet hall, three outdoor lawns, and a poolside space, each of which can accommodate hundreds of guests. Our best destination wedding packages in India include value-added services such as food and beverage catering, decorators, light, photographers, videographers, DJ, etc.

Wedding Cost: 25 lakhs

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Royal Orchid Fort Resort, Mussoorie” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Royal Orchid Fort Resort is located amidst the serene valleys of Mussoorie and is a very popular location for destination weddings in India. The resort has two banquet halls and three open-air venues, each of which can comfortably accommodate hundreds of guests. Your guests can also book their rooms at one of the resort’s 58 rooms. Our destination wedding packages include catering, photographers, videographers, and decorators.

Wedding Cost: 14 lakhs

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Hotel Clarks Shiraz, Agra” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is a 5-star luxury hotel very close to the Taj Mahal. The hotel is perfect for couples who’d like the Taj Mahal as a backdrop for their wedding venue. In fact, it has been chosen by Conde Nast Traveller as one of the top 5 hotels offering an incredible view of the Taj Mahal. Hotel Clarks Shiraz has also been consistently awarded the best wedding destination in North India. It has multiple wedding halls with luxurious interiors which can be further decorated to match your style and preferences. The hotel also has a terrace that’s perfect for open-air events where guests can have a gala while enjoying a great view of the city.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Oberoi Udaivilas, Udaipur” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Oberoi Udaivilas is a popular wedding venue for celebrities and the ultra-rich. It is an expensive location but boasts of the absolute best that money can offer. If you have always dreamed of a royal wedding, this is the perfect place.

Wedding Cost: Rs. 1.2 crore.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

FAQs about India Wedding Destination

How much does a destination wedding in India cost?
The average cost of an Indian destination wedding varies between Rs.10–30 lakh. However, prices may vary depending on the number of guests and amenities chosen.
How do I plan a destination wedding in India?
Visit us to choose from some of the best destination wedding packages in India. We’ll guide you with the entire process, including helping you choose the right location, decide on the budget, and choose caterers.
How do I book a venue or resort for a destination wedding?
Visit us or call us at 9693339999 to connect with a relationship manager at ATW Travels. All we need is a general idea, and we’ll schedule a meeting to discuss your options.
Do you organise only weddings or other events as well?
We are South India’s premium travel agency. We arrange honeymoon packages, cruise packages, and family vacation packages to more than 100 destinations in India and across the world.
Is a destination wedding safe during the pandemic?
At ATW Travels, we partner with agencies that follow all COVID protocols and preventive guidelines to help you enjoy your special day safely and securely. Agreed, planning a wedding during a pandemic is definitely a challenging task, but it shouldn’t stop you from enjoying life.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”stick-session” css=”.vc_custom_1644997479980{margin-top: 20px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”slider-sidebar”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg”][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646499567698{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
